title: Fix Row Selection Visibility in Dark Mode and Relocate Bulk Edit Button
story: As a DataTools Pro user in dark mode, I want to clearly see which table rows are selected, and I want the bulk edit button positioned on the same line as export and search for easier access.
description:
Two issues related to dark mode and bulk edit UX.

## Issues
1. **Row selection not visible in dark mode**: When selecting one or multiple records in a DataTable, the selected row highlight is not visible against the dark background
2. **Bulk edit button placement**: The multiple metrics editing button needs to be repositioned to the same line as the export and search controls for better discoverability

## Fixes
1. Updated selected row CSS to use a visible highlight color in dark mode
2. Moved the bulk edit button to align with the export and search toolbar row
acceptance_criteria: Selected rows are clearly highlighted in dark mode
Multi-selected rows are clearly highlighted in dark mode
Bulk edit button for multiple metrics is on the same line as export and search
Selection visibility works in both single and multi-select modes
ux_changes: Fixed dark mode row selection highlighting so selected rows are clearly visible. Repositioned the bulk edit button to the same toolbar line as export and search for better discoverability.
implementation_notes: CSS fix for DataTable selected row background color in dark mode. Bulk edit button DOM placement changed to align with the export/search toolbar.
comment_summary: Developer implemented both fixes and shared a screenshot of the updated dark mode appearance with visible row selection and relocated bulk edit button.
